# Seven-century pmax polish verification

This verifies a writer-side pmax polish pass on seven single-century PEF samples without changing quantization or increasing intended bit widths. Width-table shrinkage is allowed.

Sample centuries:

```text
c-0151, c-0101, c-0051, c+0000, c+0050, c+0100, c+0150
```

The sample uses the DE441 full-coverage boundary centuries, J2000, and the remaining centuries rounded from an even spacing across the full DE441 full-coverage century-index range.

## Summary

- Rows: 77 files = 7 centuries × 11 bodies
- Output root: `out/small/full-pef-7c-boundary-pmax`
- CSV: `out/small/full-pef-7c-boundary-pmax/century-pmax-polish-results.csv`
- Validation pass/diag rows: 77/77
- Exact file-size matches: 67/77
- Direct validation max non-increased rows: 76/77
- Total size before: 2009.909 KiB
- Total size after: 2009.874 KiB
